name: env_000_dummy
description: Small corporate office network: a perimeter firewall in front of a flat internal LAN containing a domain controller, two workstations, and a file server.

segments.description: Internal corporate LAN — workstations, domain controller, and file server. Address range 10.10.0.0/16.

devices.notes: Internet-facing edge device. NATs internal traffic out; no inbound rules besides a site-to-site VPN to a branch office.
Primary Active Directory domain controller for corp.local. Also runs DNS for the internal network.
Primary workstation for Alice Chen, Finance analyst.
Primary workstation for Bob Nguyen, IT administrator. Bob holds domain admin rights and regularly remotes into servers and other workstations for support.
Hosts SMB shares for the Finance and IT departments, including a Finance\Confidential share.
